title: Distillation Column Mass and Energy Balance
content: A continuous distillation column separates mixtures by vapour-liquid equilibrium differences. Overall mass balance: F = D + B (feed = distillate + bottoms). Energy balance: Q_reboiler = Q_condenser + heat losses + ΔH_separation. The McCabe-Thiele method uses equilibrium stages to relate reflux ratio R = L/D to theoretical plates. Reboiler duty Q_reb = λ·(L+D) where λ is latent heat. Monitoring reboiler and condenser temperatures enables on-line estimation of separation efficiency.
